name: Chocolate Crinkle Cookies (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oil, melted chocolate, and sugar.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually stir in the flour, baking powder, and salt until just combined.
5. Mix in the crushed nuts.
6. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
7. Roll the dough into balls about 1 tablespoon size using a teaspoon.
8. Roll each ball in confectioners' sugar.
9. Place the cookie balls about 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, ensuring they are not overbaked.
11. Yields approximately 6 to 7 dozen cookies.
From: National Grange, Family cookbook , 1979
